LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS PROVEN MANAGEMENT INC. & JORDAN ERICKSON'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED BY FAX AND OVERNIGHT DELIVERY ON NOVEMBER 12, 2013. DEFENDANTS PROVIDED ONLY 14 COURT DAYS NOTICE. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANTS ASSERT THAT PLAINTIFF WAIVED NOTICE, DEFENDANT FAILED TO SEEK RELIEF FROM THE COURT TO HEAR THIS MATTER ON SHORTENED TIME. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A NEW MOTION. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs PROVEN MANAGEMENT INC. adn JORDAN ERICKSON's Motion For Change Of Venue is continued to April 16, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its opposition papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Reset From Feb-26-14 To Mar-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PROVEN MANAGEMENT INC. & JORDAN ERICKSON'S Motion For Change Of Venue IS Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served by fax and overnight delivery on November 12, 2013. Defendants provided only 14 court days notice. To the extent that Defendants assert that Plaintiff waived notice, Defendant failed to seek relief from the Court to hear this matter on shortened time. Defendant may file a new motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
